matches.x: 1 Behold, verily I say unto you, that the heart of my servant James Covill was right before me, for he covenanted with me that he would obey my word.

1. Behold, verily, I say unto you, that the heart of my servant
 James Covill was right before me, for he covenanted with me that he
 would obey my word,

Behold, verily, I say unto you, that the heart of my servant James Covill was right before tne, for he covenanted with me, that be would obey my word. And he received the word with gladness, but straightway
